title: Notifications improvements

posts.author: Perk (Sean Perkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I would like to ask for a face lift of the notifications feature. My company won’t allow for Outlook integrations because of security concerns.

It is a bit awkward that the emails that come from the notification automations have the entire content of the notification in the both the body and the subject line of the email. Could we get a simple subject line and body break? And also not have images with the Monday.com logo all over the place?

posts.author: meddle01 (John Gray)
posts.cookedHtml:
I just found this after creating a similar post tonight about this exact thing.

Subject and Body should be text. Emails look horrible with an whole paragraph crammed into the subject title.
